hero.badge: The Ultimate QBank for Medical Students
hero.subtitle: Elevate your medical knowledge with our premium question bank. Master complex concepts, review in-depth explanations, and build the clinical confidence you need.
hero.descriptionLine1: Engage with high-yield, board-style questions curated by top medical professionals.
hero.descriptionLine2: Analyze your performance with advanced metrics and conquer every specialty.
hero.previewQuestion: A 62-year-old man presents with crushing chest pain radiating to the left arm. ECG shows ST elevation in leads V1–V4. What is the most appropriate immediate management?

howItWorks.title: Your Path to Excellence
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select specific medical specialties or systems to tailor your study sessions effectively.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Solve meticulously crafted, high-yield questions that mirror the rigor of actual board exams.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Deepen your understanding with comprehensive rationales and track your mastery over time.

valueProps.title: The MedQ Advantage
valueProps.card1Desc: Questions rigorously peer-reviewed to match the exact difficulty and style of your most crucial exams.
valueProps.card2Desc: Don't just memorize. Understand the core pathophysiology behind every correct and incorrect option.
valueProps.card3Desc: Visualize your growth, pinpoint knowledge gaps, and optimize your study strategy with real-time data.

ctaStrip.title: Ready to transform your medical journey?

landingPricing.title: Transparent Pricing
landingPricing.subtitle: Begin with 10 free high-yield questions daily, then upgrade to unlock your full potential.
landingPricing.featureUnlimited: Unlimited access to our premium question bank
landingPricing.featureApplePay: Secure, frictionless checkout via Apple Pay
landingPricing.featureManualRenew: No hidden fees. Manual renewal puts you in control.

landingFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
landingFaq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about joining MedQ.

q1.question: How does the free tier work?
q1.answer: Experience MedQ with up to 10 free questions every day. Your daily quota refreshes automatically at midnight (Riyadh Time).

q2.question: What do I get with a premium subscription?
q2.answer: You unlock unlimited, unrestricted access to our entire question bank and detailed rationales for the duration of your subscription.

q3.question: Will my subscription auto-renew?
q3.answer: No. We believe in complete transparency. All renewals are currently manual, so you will never be charged unexpectedly.

q4.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
q4.answer: We currently process all payments securely through Apple Pay via Moyasar.

metadata.title: MedQ | The Premier Medical Question Bank
